items.reason: ad hoc grep/jq audit helper; not tied to authority or runtime truth
items.best_practice_concern: mixed-scope shell audit with no governed lifecycle
items.risk_if_kept: becomes a shadow audit path and normalizes unsupported findings
items.recommended_action: delete or rewrite only if a tracked, authority-backed audit helper is needed

items.reason: generated output from the ad hoc merchant audit script
items.best_practice_concern: stale generated output is easy to mistake for current evidence
items.risk_if_kept: stale findings may be repeated as if current
items.risk_if_deleted: minimal; it is not a source of truth

items.reason: current launch gate derived from active StaffordOS truth and used for decisioning
items.best_practice_concern: operator judgment can go stale if not regenerated
items.risk_if_kept: medium; a stale score could be mistaken for current truth
items.recommended_action: keep and commit only if refreshed against current runtime truth

items.reason: active GO / NO-GO gate for revenue execution
items.related_runtime_evidence: cockpit snapshot; packet/payment authority; client registry
items.best_practice_concern: policy-like document can drift from live runtime state
items.risk_if_kept: medium; may be overread as operational proof
items.risk_if_deleted: remove the current decision gate and force rediscovery
items.recommended_action: keep and commit as a governed decision artifact

items.reason: records the active runtime repository boundary and current critical path
items.related_runtime_evidence: active repo paths; cockpit routes; client registry paths
items.best_practice_concern: snapshot can become stale if the repo boundary changes
items.risk_if_kept: low-to-medium; only dangerous if mistaken for live authority
items.risk_if_deleted: lose an important repo-boundary correction record
items.recommended_action: keep as a runtime evidence snapshot

items.reason: ties the ShopiFixer CTA to the packet-aware checkout flow and records validation
items.related_runtime_evidence: npm run build -- --webpack; /shopifixer route; POST /__public-checkout handoff
items.best_practice_concern: implementation result notes can drift from code if not updated
items.risk_if_kept: medium; may overstate current validation if the page changes later
items.risk_if_deleted: lose the clearest implementation result for the purchase handoff
items.recommended_action: keep as an execution result record

items.reason: full No Kings audit tree, including catalog truth, evidence, execution, final audit, GraphQL truth, product discovery, proof-store plan, reconciliation, scoring, and theme backup bundles
items.related_runtime_evidence: before screenshots; catalog snapshots; theme pull tests; product probe; audit narratives
items.best_practice_concern: raw evidence and narrative conclusions live together, so the bundle can sound more authoritative than it is
items.risk_if_kept: stale evidence may be mistaken for live truth
items.recommended_action: archive the tree as evidence, not truth

items.reason: scorecard/finding narrative for the No Kings audit
items.related_runtime_evidence: before screenshots and audit review notes
items.best_practice_concern: scorecard prose can be read as proof without supporting evidence

items.reason: completion note for the No Kings scorecard
items.best_practice_concern: completion language can overstate actual merchant proof

items.reason: value-gap analysis supporting the No Kings audit
items.best_practice_concern: value-gap conclusions are still analysis, not merchant proof
items.risk_if_kept: medium; can sound merchant-grade without a completed sprint

items.reason: validation note for the No Kings ShopiFixer sprint
items.best_practice_concern: validation narratives can be mistaken for executed proof

items.reason: review prompt artifact for visual assessment
items.best_practice_concern: prompt material is especially easy to misread as output
items.risk_if_kept: medium; prompt text can look like approved analysis
items.risk_if_deleted: lose the review prompt used during audit

items.reason: empty placeholder directory for after-state evidence
items.best_practice_concern: empty proof folders can imply completed evidence when none exists
items.risk_if_deleted: only loses a placeholder; harmless to recreate later
items.recommended_action: confirm whether this is an intentional staging path before keeping it

items.reason: empty placeholder directory for the proof package
items.best_practice_concern: placeholder proof-package directories can falsely imply proof exists
items.risk_if_deleted: no real data loss if it is only a placeholder
items.recommended_action: confirm whether this path is intentionally reserved; otherwise remove it

items.reason: validation comparison between No Kings and ShopiFixer standard
items.best_practice_concern: comparison docs can blur into policy if not clearly labeled

items.reason: rejected UI code retained as a negative example
items.best_practice_concern: AI-generated UI code is high-risk for reintroduction if not quarantined
items.risk_if_kept: medium-to-high; can leak back into the app if not clearly quarantined
items.risk_if_deleted: lose a reference example of what was rejected
items.recommended_action: archive in the rejected_ui quarantine only

items.reason: backup snapshots for contact research and contact targets
items.best_practice_concern: backup snapshots are not live lifecycle truth
items.risk_if_kept: stale contact data may be mistaken for active lead truth

items.reason: inventory of canonical artifacts
items.best_practice_concern: inventories are reference material, not authoritative truth

items.reason: systems reconciliation map
items.best_practice_concern: canonical-sounding maps can be overread as source truth

items.reason: notes on client promotion path
items.best_practice_concern: text notes can be mistaken for implemented flow

items.reason: commercialization gap analysis
items.best_practice_concern: gaps are useful but not proof

items.reason: commercial truth mapping note
items.best_practice_concern: truth maps can sound authoritative without being canonical

items.reason: blocker analysis for lifecycle convergence
items.best_practice_concern: blocker lists can age quickly

items.reason: dependency graph for convergence work
items.best_practice_concern: graphs can imply structure that may not exist in code

items.reason: status reconciliation note for convergence
items.best_practice_concern: status reports age fast and can sound more final than they are

items.reason: critical-path challenge note
items.best_practice_concern: challenge notes are guidance, not implementation proof

items.reason: merchant lifecycle artifact inventory
items.best_practice_concern: inventory files are not lifecycle truth

items.reason: next-node recommendation from the lifecycle audit
items.best_practice_concern: recommendations should not be mistaken for implemented work

items.reason: outreach readiness reconciliation note
items.best_practice_concern: readiness conclusions can outlive the evidence that supported them

items.reason: outreach readiness summary
items.best_practice_concern: summary docs can become stale quickly

items.reason: backup snapshots for contact research and contact targets
items.best_practice_concern: backup snapshots are not live lifecycle truth
items.risk_if_kept: stale contact data may be mistaken for active lead truth

items.reason: records the active runtime repository boundary and current critical path
items.related_runtime_evidence: active repo paths; cockpit routes; client registry paths
items.best_practice_concern: snapshot can become stale if the repo boundary changes
items.risk_if_kept: low-to-medium; only dangerous if mistaken for live authority

items.reason: incident bundle containing git_diff.patch, git_status.txt, runtime_check.txt, and critical_files.tgz
items.best_practice_concern: generated incident bundles are easy to confuse with source truth
items.recommended_action: archive, ideally out of the active workspace

items.reason: all remaining operator-design planning/verification docs are analysis artifacts, not source truth
items.related_runtime_evidence: planning and verification notes across lifecycle, ShopiFixer, and merchant-priority work
items.best_practice_concern: analysis outputs can masquerade as authority when the filenames sound canonical
items.risk_if_kept: medium; broad archive of analysis artifacts can be mistaken for current truth
items.risk_if_deleted: lose the reasoning trail for the current implementation wave
items.recommended_action: archive the directory bundle; do not treat it as truth
